name: Wall of Doom
author: Poki
description: Wall of Doom is an arcade game where you have to run, dodge and make your way through the walls that speed at you! Make sure you're in the right spot, otherwise it's game over. Collect coins around the levels to become faster and get higher scores! How far can you make it without being hit by the Wall of Doom? How to play Wall Of Doom? Movement: Use the arrow keys, WASD or click and drag with the mouse to move around! Who created Wall of Doom? Wall of Doom is created by Fancade. Play their other games on Poki: Drive Mad , Stacktris , Monster Tracks , Recoil , Speed King and Gobble ! How can I play Wall of Doom for free? You can play Wall of Doom for free on Poki. Can I play Wall of Doom on mobile devices and desktop? Wall of Doom can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
